title: Proscenio PSD manifest
description: Output of the Proscenio Photoshop UXP exporter; input of the Proscenio Blender importer.

format_version.description: Bump on any breaking change to the shape of this document. v2 introduces the tag-driven taxonomy in SPEC 011 (anchor, per-entry origin, blend_mode, subfolder, kind: mesh).

doc.description: Original PSD filename. Display only - not a resolvable path.

pixels_per_unit.description: Importer divides PSD pixels by this when stamping mesh size and position.

anchor.description: Document anchor in PSD pixels. Set by the first horizontal + vertical PSD guide; importer places the root bone here. Omitted when no guides were authored.

layers.description: Z-ordered top-to-bottom. Each entry is a single mesh in Blender after import.

blend_mode.description: Layer blend mode emitted from the PSD; importer maps to material blend mode.

kind.description: polygon = single PNG, single quad mesh. mesh = polygon flagged as deformable mesh source (SPEC 002 / 008 hint; renders as polygon when no rig is bound).

path.description: Path to the layer PNG, relative to the manifest file.

position.description: PSD top-left bbox of the layer in pixels.

origin.description: Optional pivot in PSD pixels. Set by the [origin:x,y] tag or by an [origin] marker layer inside the group. Importer uses this as the mesh's Object.location when present; falls back to bbox center otherwise.

subfolder.description: Optional output sub-folder under images/, set by the [folder:name] tag. Importer ignores; this is purely a disk-layout hint reflected in `path`.

kind.description: N frames, single quad mesh, animated via proscenio.frame. Authored as a LayerSet tagged [spritesheet].

position.description: PSD top-left bbox of the largest frame.

size.description: Largest frame bbox size in pixels (importer pads smaller frames to match).

origin.description: Optional pivot in PSD pixels (see polygon_layer.origin).

path.description: Path to the frame PNG, relative to the manifest file.
